column2: >If you want to shine, our cotton scarf will help you do it. You can emphasize your beauty. Our stylish clothes are indeed special. Any look can be complemented by such a luxurious accoutrement. Try to wrap the scarf as a dress. You are guaranteed to draw the attention of people around.
>Our wings of freedom will carry you into a dream world. Such colored feathers will become a bright accessory that is perfect for an evening attire.
>We offer the best women’s accessories at pleasant prices. These bohemian garments are a must-have in the wardrobe of every fashionista.
>Fabric: 100% cotton. Print on one side, while the other side is slightly lighter. Size: 27.5 in x 80 in (70 cm x 202 cm). Decorative thin fashion scarf to look beautiful, but not to get warm.
>The order is dispatched within 1-2 working days.
>Care: Please treat it with care as any delicate fabric. Rinse the scarf in soapy water and gently wash the soap away. Lay flat to dry indoors or outdoors in the shade.
>The cost of delivery is $14.

>If the product is in stock, it is dispatched within 1-2 working days after receipt of the payment. If the product is out of stock, it takes from 1 to 4 weeks to produce it. After the product arrives at the warehouse, it is shipped within 1-2 days. We will send your tracking number after your order is shipped out. Please keep in mind that it can take up to 24 hours before the information about your order is updated. Unfortunately, for some countries the parcel will not be trackable. It depends on the country of destination.

>It usually takes from 10 to 30 days to deliver your product. Sometimes the delivery time may be longer due to reasons beyond our control. Please notice that you may be charged customs duties in your country.
>If you have any questions, please use the contact form on our site to contact us, or email us at scarves@wingsofwin.com

column2: >Goth accessories are popular nowadays. The wings scarf looks unusual and thus serves to underline your beauty. Our gorgeous black scarf is a must-have in your wardrobe. Such evening scarf will be the perfect complement of your image.

>Fabric: 100% cotton. Print on one side, while the other side is slightly lighter. Size: 27.5 in x 80 in (70 cm x 202 cm). Decorative thin fashion scarf to look beautiful, but not to get warm.
>The order is dispatched within 1-2 working days.
>Care: Please treat it with care as any delicate fabric. Rinse the scarf in soapy water and gently wash the soap away. Lay flat to dry indoors or outdoors in the shade.
>The cost of delivery is $14.

>If the product is in stock, it is dispatched within 1-2 working days after receipt of the payment. If the product is out of stock, it takes from 1 to 4 weeks to produce it. column2: >Fabric: 100% cotton. Print on one side, while the other side is slightly lighter. Adult scarf size - 27,5 in x 80 in (70 cm x 203 cm), Children scarf size - 19 in x 54 in (48 cm x 136 cm). Decorative thin fashion scarf to look beautiful, but not to get warm.

>Fabric: 100% silk satin. Print on one side, while the other side is slightly lighter. Adult scarf size - 24.5 in x 79 in (62 cm x 200 cm), Children scarf size - 19 in x 49 in (48 cm x 125 cm). Decorative thin fashion scarf to look beautiful, but not to get warm.
>The order is dispatched within 1-2 working days.
>Care: Please treat it with care as any delicate fabric. Rinse the scarf in soapy water and gently wash the soap away. Lay flat to dry indoors or outdoors in the shade.
>The cost of delivery is $14.

>If the product is in stock, it is dispatched within 1-2 working days after receipt of the payment. If the product is out of stock, it takes from 1 to 4 weeks to produce it. After the product arrives at the warehouse, it is shipped within 1-2 days. We will send your tracking number after your order is shipped out. Please keep in mind that it can take up to 24 hours before the information about your order is updated. Unfortunately, for some countries the parcel will not be trackable. It depends on the country of destination.

>It usually takes from 10 to 30 days to deliver your product. Sometimes the delivery time may be longer due to reasons beyond our control. Please notice that you may be charged customs duties in your country.
>If you have any questions, please use the contact form on our site to contact us, or email us at scarves@wingsofwin.com
